prompt: A hyper-detailed ultra-high-resolution vertical illustration of a surreal Japanese futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a very high, steep downward angle through a cramped canyon of buildings, as if standing on a dark hillside alley or rooftop overlook. Keep the composition 9:16 and dramatic, with a deep plunging perspective into an immense glowing urban basin packed with tightly layered low rooftops, narrow streets, elevated walkways, and towering skyscrapers fading into the distance. Frame the scene with dense foreground architecture on both sides: on the upper left, a large glowing red paper lantern sign with bold black Japanese characters hanging from an old wooden eave; on the right, a tall building facade with many lit windows and several vertical neon signs; across the image, tangled overhead utility wires and poles cut through the view. The city below should feel overcrowded yet mesmerizing, blending retro Showa-era alleyway aesthetics with cyberpunk futurism. Use a rich, graphic painterly style with strong black inky linework, bold cel-shaded shapes, and luminous neon accents, preserving a Midjourney-like cinematic beauty while adding much finer environmental detail. Dominant colors are blazing orange and amber window light, saturated crimson and scarlet signage, deep violet night sky, hot magenta highlights, and electric cyan accents. Populate the lower city with countless tiny readable micro-scenes implied through silhouettes and lit windows: festival processions in the streets, nightlife crowds, exhausted salary workers, hidden gang figures in side alleys, dancers in entertainment lanes, students studying in apartment windows, arguing couples, gamers at glowing screens, and many other small human stories embedded throughout the architecture. Emphasize the contrast between urban splendor and emotional isolation, overcrowded boredom and decadent beauty, with a satirical undertone about meaningless modern life. The image must remain aesthetically harmonious despite the density, with crisp small details visible everywhere, glowing signage in Japanese, layered depth, atmospheric haze, and a surreal, slightly oppressive but beautiful mood.
